title: A thought or two on Kyokos soul
display_title: A thought or two on Kyokos soul
wikitext:
[]: A thought or two on Kyoko's soul             Quote Post by Ash1969 » Tue Aug 18, 2015 2:00 pm So as we all know, in EoE Asuka found out Kyoko was the soul of Unit-02. Back in Episode 22 it was revealed that she had undergone a contact experiment similar to Ikari's, only she went insane and committed suicide instead of just "dying" like Yui. This (unintentionally perhaps) helped explain why Shinji eventually got a better synch rate than Asuka. But then in EoE you can hear crazy Kyoko whispering to Asuka while the latter goes on about not wanting to die. The consensus of the board was that either insane Kyoko's soul reunited with Unit-02's after the suicide, or that it was just Asuka's memories/hallucinations. I always agreed with the former but I had my own little theory on how it happened. I actually don't fully agree with it myself and it violates Occam's Razor. In the end though, I thought it was too interesting not to share. So, while some people might disagree with Rei I being Unit-00's soul, even if it was [url]wiki.evageeks.org/Naoko_Akagi[/url] the point is that Unit 00's soul was salvaged from a dead body. Even if you are one of those fans who think Unit-00 didn't have a soul or something Unit-03's soul was salvaged from Toji's mom. Now to get to my main point; most people think Kyoko's soul just left her body and joined up with her soul in Unit-02 after she died. It's not something that's really contradicted by the series or supplemental material and it's simple by Eva’s standards. But, if you overanalyze it like I did, maybe what happened to Toji's mom and/or Rei I happened to Kyoko. There's two details from the show that sort of undermine my thesis. First, we see Kyoko's funeral with Asuka attending. It's never stated what exactly they do with the bodies of salvaged souls but even if Kyoko wasn't turned into LCL, I think Asuka or someone would notice if Nerv took her body to wherever they were storing Unit-02. Last, but not least, I always found it more than a coincidence that Asuka was selected to a pilot the same day Kyoko committed suicide. If they needed to salvage her soul afterwards then it becomes just a coincidence and looks a bit contrived. All in all this was just food for thought. What are your opinions on the subject?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Aug 18, 2015 4:58 pm Honestly, I don't even know what you're saying here. We have a pretty good idea of what happened with Kyoko's soul; apart from what's shown in the show it's spelled out in detail in the Classified Information. The only question at this point is whether or not the two halves of her soul were reunited after her death. (That said, it is possible the same thing happened to her that happened to Rei II; if Rei II underwent the Contact Experiment with Unit 00 it's possible her soul was divided just as Kyoko's was, and that this is why Rei acts like she has something like schizoid personality disorder. So, there would be no need to explain how or why Nerv divided her soul when reincarnating her, as they'd just stick the whole thing in a new body and leave the rest to her Eva. I think this is a rather elegant take on the matter, but of course there's so little information on the subject that it's really not better or worse than any other.)

[]:             Quote Post by Ash1969 » Tue Aug 18, 2015 5:16 pm Bagheera wrote: Honestly, I don't even know what you're saying here. We have a pretty good idea of what happened with Kyoko's soul; apart from what's shown in the show it's spelled out in detail in the Classified Information. The only question at this point is whether or not the two halves of her soul were reunited after her death.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Aug 18, 2015 5:19 pm Ash1969 wrote: That perhaps after Kyoko died Nerv conducted a wiki.evageeks.org/Salvaging Operation like they did with Toji's mom.

[]:             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Tue Aug 18, 2015 5:21 pm Bagheera wrote: (That said, it is possible the same thing happened to her that happened to Rei II

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Aug 18, 2015 5:23 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: Doesn't Rei II already have half a soul, or are you suggesting that she was whole before the CE?

[]:             Quote Post by Ash1969 » Tue Aug 18, 2015 5:25 pm Bagheera wrote: . . . but Kyoko was still alive. She wasn't absorbed into the Eva so there was nothing to salvage. I guess they might have tried to retrieve the part of her soul that was in the Eva, but I don't see how that would explain anything.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Aug 18, 2015 5:34 pm Ash1969 wrote: You misunderstand me, Nerv wouldn't conduct a Salvage Operation with Unit-02 but with dead Kyoko. You know, like how they put Toji's mom's soul in Unit-03 even though she was dead?

[]:             Quote Post by Ash1969 » Tue Aug 18, 2015 5:38 pm Bagheera wrote: Ah. That's not how the term is normally used, but okay. In that case what you're suggesting isn't novel, as it's what most people assume happened (hence the two Kyokos during EoE). The theories that Asuka was hearing Kyoko in her memories or that the portion of Kyoko in her Eva fragmented further due to the mindrape are the outliers, and they don't have much support (though they are both as plausible as anything, particularly the second).

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Aug 18, 2015 6:21 pm Nah. See the Wiki entries for Unit 02 and Kyoko; the notion that Nerv shoved her into the Eva after she died is pretty popular.

[]:             Quote Post by Ash1969 » Tue Aug 18, 2015 6:36 pm Bagheera wrote: Nah. See the Wiki entries for Unit 02 and Kyoko; the notion that Nerv shoved her into the Eva after she died is pretty popular.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Aug 18, 2015 6:48 pm Ash1969 wrote: Don't you think Asuka or her relatives would become suspicious if Nerv took her body to be salvaged after the suicide?

[]:             Quote Post by Ash1969 » Tue Aug 18, 2015 7:06 pm I'll just say what I said in the OP. The whole thing with Kyoko committing suicide the same day Asuka became an Eva Pilot is too coincidental.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Aug 18, 2015 7:20 pm Ash1969 wrote: I'll just say what I said in the OP. The whole thing with Kyoko committing suicide the same day Asuka became an Eva Pilot is too coincidental.

[]:             Quote Post by Ash1969 » Tue Aug 18, 2015 7:30 pm I don't think Nerv had anything to do with her suicide other than the Contact Experiment. I just thought that after her death there wasn't a Salvage Operation but Kyoko's soul reunited with Unit-02's anyway. I was under the impression that was the consensus around here. Apparently I was mistaken, and you are the Asuka expert after all.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Aug 18, 2015 7:35 pm Ash1969 wrote: I don't think Nerv had anything to do with her suicide other than the Contact Experiment. I just thought that after her death there wasn't a Salvage Operation but Kyoko's soul reunited with Unit-02's anyway. I was under the impression that was the consensus around here. Apparently I was mistaken, and you are the Asuka expert after all.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Aug 18, 2015 7:44 pm Maybe Kyoko's soul never did rejoin? We only see the motherly side of her in Unit 02, and that's the part it was supposed to have taken. I thought the "die with me" we hear in EoE was just Asuka's bad memories, which is why it's drowned out by Kyoko telling her to live.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Aug 18, 2015 7:49 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: Maybe Kyoko's soul never did rejoin? We only see the motherly side of her in Unit 02, and that's the part it was supposed to have taken. I thought the "die with me" we hear in EoE was just Asuka's bad memories, which is why it's drowned out by Kyoko telling her to live.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Aug 18, 2015 9:25 pm Ash1969 wrote: The whole thing with Kyoko committing suicide the same day Asuka became an Eva Pilot is too coincidental.

[]:             Quote Post by Ash1969 » Tue Aug 18, 2015 10:05 pm UrsusArctos wrote: It seems to have been an act of plot convenience rather than a contrivance on Nerv's part - after all, Asuka discovered the corpse and what good would it have done Nerv to have one of their precious Eva pilots irrevocably traumatized by something as unspeakable horrific as finding their mother's hanging body?
